title: Ichi the Killer Doesn't Owe You an Explanation. sabukaru meets Sakichi Sato, the screenwriter behind the cult classic
summary: The turn of the millennium produced some of the most uncompromising cinema the world had seen, leaving an indelible mark on filmgoers worldwide. Among the films of that era, Ichi the Killer is one that comes up without fail, a reference point that refuses to be buried by time. It belongs to a specific and unforgiving corner of cinema: films where violence i…
content: Ichi the Killer Doesn't Owe You an Explanation. sabukaru meets Sakichi Sato, the screenwriter behind the cult classic
